calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. GARY KAPLAN, Esq. of Farella Braun + Martel LLP (tel: 415-954-4400) for Petitioners.
Respondent BRYANT FU, in pro per present.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP, GARY KAPLAN, DAVID HOFMAYER's Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award.

Matter discussed as to the status of the case and the costs issue. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the petition. Counsel Kaplan is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. GARY KAPLAN, Esq. of Farella Braun + Martel LLP (tel: 415-954-4400) for Petitioners (via Zoom videoconference).
Respondent BRYANT FU, in pro per present.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP, GARY KAPLAN, DAVID HOFMAYER's Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award.

Matter discussed. The Court notes the parties have not resolved all the disputes in this case. The Court continues the matter to April 22, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
